Temperature-Scaled Similarity
s(t,g) = σ( ⟨zTF, zGene⟩ / τ )
τ = 0.05 · σ = sigmoid

η=5×10⁻³ β₁=0.9 β₂=0.999
batch=256 epochs≤60
